repair_candidate.summary: Repair #90273 by keeping the Windows hardlink compatibility intent while addressing hydrated Copilot review blockers: avoid synchronous filesystem probing at module import time, keep tmpdir creation inside guarded logic, and preserve test skip behavior when hardlinks are unavailable.
repair_candidate.pr_title: test: repair fs-safe hardlink capability probe
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- repair the fs-safe hardlink capability probe from #90273 so filesystem setup failures are handled inside the test flow
- avoid module-import-time synchronous filesystem I/O for the hardlink probe
- keep Windows hardlink tests enabled when the runtime environment supports hardlinks

## Credit
This repair is based on source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90273 by @aniruddhaadak80. Clownfish is preserving attribution for the original test compatibility work.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run src/infra/fs-safe.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Credit source PR #90273 by @aniruddhaadak80 for the Windows hardlink test compatibility approach.
Preserve attribution in the repair PR body and any closeout/follow-up notes.
